dashboard.strategy_desc: Complete your daily cognitive tasks to maintain your streak. Each verified quiz adds $0.20 to your balance. Watch high-yield videos to unlock passive rewards.

videos.title: Earning Catalog
videos.desc: Watch curated training modules to earn digital assets. Our verified attention protocol rewards your time and cognitive engagement.

wallet.title: Financial Hub
wallet.desc: Manage your verified assets. Track every point earned and initiate secure withdrawals to your preferred payout channel.
wallet.activate_desc: Initialize your node for a one-time protocol fee of $1.00.
wallet.transfer_desc: Convert main assets into gaming tokens.
wallet.deposit_desc: Add funds to your main balance via secure external channels.
wallet.deposit_success: Capital injection protocol initiated! System waiting for manual validation.

games.title: Token Strategy Games
games.desc: Participate in decentralized probability games to multiply your verified tokens.
games.loss_msg: Protocol Mismatch: Better luck next time.

tour.welcome_desc: This tour will guide you through the main features of your decentralized earning dashboard.
tour.balances_desc: Monitor your Main Balance (withdrawals) and Game Balance (for playing games) in real-time.
tour.tasks_desc: Complete quizzes and watch videos every day to maximize your yields and maintain your streak.
tour.activity_desc: Every micro-transaction is recorded on our transparent ledger for your review.

hero.desc: A high-precision reward ecosystem for verified cognitive work. Complete daily assessments and unlock institutional-grade liquidity.

features.work_desc: Proprietary algorithms ensuring authentic human cognitive engagement for every task.
features.yield_desc: Daily quotas optimized to provide maximum value for attention in the GMT+2 corridor.
features.liquid_desc: Direct-to-node withdrawals once the $5 threshold is validated by the network.

auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your verified email address to receive a cryptographic reset link.
auth.reset_email_sent: Recovery Protocol Initiated. Check your secure channel (Email).
auth.reset_password_desc: Configure your new authorization parameters below.
auth.password_reset_success: Credentials updated successfully. System ready for re-authorization.
